reason: Irreconcilable conflict between rubrics. behavior_in_task_description requires specifying exact implementation details (variable name 'entry_point_to_js_chunk_idx', maxInt sentinel values, code location patterns) that tests check for, but no_solution_leakage and instruction_no_hint_leakage forbid specifying those same details. solution_uniqueness_guard and tests_verify_behavior_not_text are also failing because tests verify code structure (via regex) rather than behavior. The tests need rewriting, not the instruction.
